examples: Steven killed the bird with his pocketknife.
She knocks his gun aside and he flips open a pocketknife on Kim.
Matt, you got your pocketknife on you? I need you to cut me loose.
This time, he selected a piece of charcoal more carefully and, with his pocketknife, scraped its end to a semblance of sharpness.
Some of these knives are primarily weapons and do not serve the similar purpose as what you would call a small pocketknife.
